_notes: Pre-defined model groupings for the 'all' command. Each preset is a list of catalog_id entries from models_catalog.json plus an optional max_ctx ceiling that further narrows the Tier A context sweep.
The 'custom' name is reserved at the CLI level: it triggers CustomBenchView for fine-grained model + context picking and is not defined here.
User-saved presets live in data/user_bench_presets.json and override defaults with the same name (deep-replace, not merge — pick a different name if you want to keep both).
